original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Matthew, James, Samuel, and Sofia. Matthew expressed that James is a knight if and only if James is a knave. "Samuel is a knight," James claimed. Samuel said that Sofia is not a knight. "Samuel is a knight if and only if Sofia is a knight," Sofia declared. So who is a knight and who is a knave?
